---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
---

<!-- FACILITIES, EQUIPMENT, AND OTHER RESOURCES – No page limit (PAPPG II.D.2.g)
     Per NSF PAPPG: Describe resources available to perform the effort
     proposed. Should satisfy both Intellectual Merit and Broader Impacts
     review criteria. Include an aggregated description of internal and
     external resources. Must be narrative — no quantifiable financial
     information (that belongs in the budget).

     UNFUNDED COLLABORATIONS (PAPPG II.D.2.d(iv)):
     If individuals not in the budget contribute substantially to the
     project, describe their roles here and provide a letter of
     collaboration in supplementary docs using this format:
       "If the proposal submitted by Dr. [PI name] entitled [title]
       is selected for funding by NSF, it is my intent to collaborate
       and/or commit resources as detailed in the Project Description
       or the Facilities, Equipment and Other Resources section."
     Letters should NOT contain endorsements or evaluation. -->

# Facilities, Equipment, and Other Resources

TODO: Describe the facilities and resources available at your
institution to support the proposed research. Include:

- Office and laboratory space
- Computing infrastructure (existing)
- Library and electronic resources
- Administrative support
- Relevant centers, institutes, or programs

TODO: If the project will acquire new equipment or infrastructure,
describe what will be added and how it complements existing resources.

TODO: Note any gaps in current infrastructure that the proposed project
addresses.
